'''dhashushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oscillogenesis|oscillogenesis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oscillogenesis|oscillogenesis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhashushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæshishith|dhæshishith]] || [[word:dhæshishij|dhæshishij]] || [[word:dhæshishish|dhæshishish]] || [[word:dhæshishi|dhæshishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashushushuth|dhashushushuth]] || [[word:dhashushushuj|dhashushushuj]] || [[word:dhashushushush|dhashushushush]] || [[word:dhashushushu|dhashushushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhashushuth|dhashushuth]] || [[word:dhashushuj|dhashushuj]] || [[word:dhashushush|dhashushush]] || [[word:dhashushu|dhashushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashufshuth|dhashufshuth]] || [[word:dhashufshuj|dhashufshuj]] || [[word:dhashufshush|dhashufshush]] || [[word:dhashufshuf|dhashufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhashushuthu|dhashushuthu]] || [[word:dhashushuju|dhashushuju]] || [[word:dhashushushu|dhashushushu]] || [[word:dhashushuku|dhashushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhashushuth|dhashushuth]] || [[word:dhashushuj|dhashushuj]] || [[word:dhashushush|dhashushush]] || [[word:dhashushu|dhashushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhashushuthul|dhashushuthul]] || [[word:dhashushujul|dhashushujul]] || [[word:dhashushushul|dhashushushul]] || [[word:dhashushukul|dhashushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhashushuthuthu|dhashushuthuthu]] || [[word:dhashushujuju|dhashushujuju]] || [[word:dhashushushushu|dhashushushushu]] || [[word:dhashushuku|dhashushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhashushuthun|dhashushuthun]] || [[word:dhashushujun|dhashushujun]] || [[word:dhashushushun|dhashushushun]] || [[word:dhashushukun|dhashushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhashushuthuoro|dhashushuthuoro]] || [[word:dhashushujuoro|dhashushujuoro]] || [[word:dhashushushuoro|dhashushushuoro]] || [[word:dhashushukuoro|dhashushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
